latest.notes: External Audio milestone: point the station at a synced folder (Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, iCloud) and its audio appears in every picker — drag into logs, pre-name slots that pull the file when they air, and set overlap timing; works over the LAN. Plus: Settings is its own window, the Log Editor offers Generate for empty days and only rebuilds upcoming hours/breaks on the current day, and a refreshed Voice Track editor.
